note: Benchmark numbers are vendor/media/third-party and provisional — verify against official reports.

rows: compress every m tokens' KV → top-k; layers alternate
block selection but attention on REAL KV

takeaways: Best Ascend port targets: MiniMax-M3 (plain GQA → easiest on NPU, fast decode) + GLM-5.2 (MIT base for RL post-training); DeepSeek-V4 as the already-supported large rollout/eval baseline.
Decode-side sparse attention directly eases Ascend's no-sleep-mode rollout/train memory contention — quantify it in the benchmark.
Custom attention (CSA/HCA/DSA/MSA) re-implemented on NPU raises numeric-drift risk — exactly what align-probe should diagnose.
V4's validated FP8 training + Ascend 950 native FP8 make FP8 RL on Ascend a viable, high-novelty topic.
